name: Caminar
description: Basic directional movement. The most fundamental act of will in this world.
lore: In the Woven World, even walking is a skill — the act of threading one's body through the fabric of reality.

params.note: Input vector is clamped to unit circle BEFORE converting to world-space. This prevents the √2 (1.41x) speed boost on diagonals. The joystick's analog range (0.0-1.0) provides natural speed scaling for partial tilt.

note: This is the ONLY skill that is always active and requires no button press. It reads the left stick and WASD continuously. Engine implementation: PlayerController._physics_process_movement() reads input, normalizes, converts to world-space relative to character facing, applies to velocity.x/z. Gravity (velocity.y) is handled separately by the character body.

diagonal_math.result: Diagonal input at full stick tilt = same speed as cardinal. Partial tilt = proportional speed (analog).

name: Saltar
description: Vertical launch. Defies gravity briefly through force of will.
lore: The first rebellion against the world's heavy gravity — a small victory, but a victory.

name: Correr
lore: Channeling vitality into velocity — the body burns to move faster.
note: While held, re-casts every 0.1s to maintain the buff. Stamina drains continuously.

name: Esquivar
description: Rapid dash with invincibility frames. The art of not being where the attack lands.
lore: A momentary dissolution of the self — the body becomes briefly unreal.
